title: Flaky Fried Italian Meat Panforte
description: A crispy Italian dish featuring double cream and rest meat, perfect for brunch, and can be adapted to be dairy free friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the ground beef, double cream, italian seasoning, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
Gradually add the flour to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead for 5 minutes.
Divide the dough into 6 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops of the disks with olive oil and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the panforte from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Fry the panforte in a large skillet with olive oil over medium heat until crispy and golden brown.
Serve the flaky fried italian meat panforte hot and enjoy.
